failure_signature: User asked to search for local project files, but tavily web search skill was triggered instead of using local file search or grep
user_correction: User clarified they wanted to search within the project codebase, not the web
remedy: tavily should only trigger when user explicitly mentions web search, online research, or finding information on the internet. Local file/code search should route to grep or file search tools.

failure_signature: Web search API returned rate limit exceeded error after multiple consecutive queries in a single session
user_correction: User waited a few minutes and retried with fewer queries
remedy: Implement query batching and caching within the skill. Warn user when approaching rate limits and suggest consolidating searches.

failure_signature: tavily skill description mentioned 'web search' but did not indicate it also supports extracting page content, causing user to load separate scraping skill unnecessarily
user_correction: User discovered tavily had content extraction after loading both skills
remedy: tavily description should list all capabilities: search, extract, summarize pages. Avoid forcing users to load redundant scraping skills.
